title: Open Access for Türkiye - What You Need To Know, From How To Publish Your Article To Getting Funded
content:
Open Access for Türkiye - What You Need To Know, From How To Publish Your Article To Getting Funded

Topics Covered

TÜBİTAK – ULAKBIM TA Agreement Overview

Eligibility criteria/papers included in the agreement

Tips and tricks on writing a successful paper for publishing

Applying for funding to publish your article Open Access

The session will be in Turkish mainly and few parts are going to be covered in English.

Date and time:

March 27,

2024 11:00 AM Istanbul time

Kindly note that you need to register at the mentioned links below to attend the webinar.

Once you register you will receive a confirmation email where you can add the webinar to your calendar from. Please share the invitation with your colleagues and team members and invite anyone who might benefit from the webinar.

Registration link

https://us06web.zoom.us/webinar/register/9517109227526/WN_DZ668-CQSbyYQdMj9Lonaw

NOTE:

Kindly note that Zoom has a capacity of 1000 attendees per session and it is automated on the basis of first come and first serve basis, which we have no control over, therefore we will offer the recording.
